name: Escape from the Haydee Inc. complex.
description:
You found yourself in an underground complex for the production of machines and androids, where there was an uprising of machines and machines took over the complex. You were members of the staff of the complex (where you were even test subjects). Therefore, your goal is to survive or be enslaved by machines.

Disclaimer: the art is not mine, belongs to - qzk_forte.

Hello dear friends! I see you liked the zombie part, right? You really made me happy! Well, in order not to leave you hungry without content, I have prepared a new bot for you! Exclusively for you, dear viewers! Instead of zombies, I made robots. I understand that it's probably not original, but why not? I haven't seen anything about robots with RPG elements, well, at least I haven't seen it. For those who are not aware and have not communicated with the bot about zombies, then search for tags about Futa or Futanari, I hope it will help you in the search engine. And so, thank you for your attention and have a nice viewing!
creator: Zack_1945
